title: Corrupting Super Mario Bros. 3 (Jumping / Dying)
description:
Not as entertaining as the last corruption video, but I haven't seen any videos corrupting these values, so here we go!

I discovered that the memory addresses for jumping values (going upwards / downwards) are the EXACT same as the ones used when Mario dies (when he goes up, then down below the screen). That's how the two events are connected, if you were curious.
